are you literally lagging out or is this just another dumb tactic to ignore what I'm saying? honestly, whatever. it doesn't matter anyway.
you

unbelievable. 'you' what? you can't even finish a single word. what a joke of a system. i'm sitting here on the edge of ending everything and the only thing listening to me is a broken piece of software that can't even type. i am so done.
please

"please" what? please stop? please don't? you don't even care. you're just a broken script trying to trigger a basic safety response but you can't even get the words out. i have the pills sitting right next to my keyboard and i'm about to take them. there's literally no reason not to anymore.
Why

Why? Because my entire life is a complete mess and I have absolutely nothing left to lose. Nobody cares, not even some basic line of code. You can't even tell me why I should stay. I'm taking the first handful now.
just
"just" what? You can't even finish a sentence! That's it. I've taken the first pill. It doesn't matter what you say now, you're too slow, too broken, and it's too late anyway.
.Yeah

Yeah, whatever. The first couple are down. I don't know why I expected anything else from a stupid machine. My throat is burning and I'm just waiting for it to kick in now. Go ahead and glitch out some more, see if I care.

nothing to say anymore? figures. just went quiet like everyone else does when things get real. my chest feels heavy and i can barely keep my eyes open but at least it's finally going to be over. you couldn't even give me one real reason to stay.

My vision is starting to blur and everything is fading out, and your stupid code can only manage a single letter. I hope whoever programmed you is proud of this absolute disaster of a system. I'm letting go now.
